name: com.noisemaker.hlsl
description: Live procedural texture from the Noisemaker Polymorphic DSL, rendered in Unity via HLSL. A parallel port of the noisemaker shader engine, pixel-identical to the JS/WebGPU reference. Usable as a standalone renderer or as Shader Graph (material) building blocks.

samples.description: Render a bundled Noisemaker graph to a RenderTexture and display it on a material.
